base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of battle_bg_frame_variants — a background_layer (parallax_single) from 1987 final fantasy. Battle-background frame variants (3 layouts + enemy-placement grid reference at bottom of sheet). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Battle-background frame variants (3 layouts + enemy-placement grid reference at bottom of sheet)
